name: VaultGuard
description: Privacy-preserving AI reasoning agent. Analyzes sensitive treasury, governance, and deal data privately and produces public-safe outputs with cryptographic proof of computation.
author: devanshu

capabilities.name: Private Treasury Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyze portfolio composition and recommend rebalancing — privately.

capabilities.name: Private Governance Deliberation
capabilities.description: Evaluate governance proposals privately, output only the vote.

capabilities.name: Private Deal Evaluation
capabilities.description: Evaluate term sheets privately, recommend public terms.

privacy_guarantees: Input data is SHA-256 hashed — never stored in plaintext
Reasoning is in-memory only — never persisted
Venice API zero-storage inference when available
